zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Vesci於1205年5月16日出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，他的父親Eustace de Vescy36歲，母親Margaret Of Scotland35歲。他於1244年與Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder'在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1253年10月7日在法國加斯可享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾華頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vesci
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Calabria): patronymic or plural form of   Vescio  .

variants.name: Vescio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Carmela, Ettore, Pasquale, Serafino, Vito.

Italian: probably a nickname from Calabrese dialect vesciu ‘cross-eyed person’ or vescia ‘kind of mushroom’. In Italy the surname is most frequent in Calabria, specifically in Lamezia Terme in Catanzaro province.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Vesci was born on 16 May 1205, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, his father, Eustace de Vescy, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Of Scotland, was 35. He married Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder' in 1244, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 7 October 1253, in Gascogne, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Watton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Vesci est né le 16 mai 1205, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Eustace de Vescy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Of Scotland, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder' en 1244, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1253, à Gascogne, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Watton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Vesci am 16. Mai 1205 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustace de Vescy 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Of Scotland 35. Er hat 1244 in Northumberland, England Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder' geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1253 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Gascogne, Frankreich und wurde in Watton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Vesci è nato il il 16 maggio 1205 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Eustace de Vescy, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Of Scotland, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder' nel 1244, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 7 ottobre 1253, nel Gascogne, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Watton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Vesciが1205年5月16日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父Eustace de Vescyは36歳，母Margaret Of Scotlandは35歳であった。1244年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでAgnes de Ferrers 'The Elder'と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1253年10月7日にフランスガスコグンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Vesci(이)가 1205년 5월 16일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustace de Vescy(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Of Scotland(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1244년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder'(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 10월 7일 프랑스 가스코그니에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 왓튼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Vesci nasceu em 16 de maio de 1205, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eustace de Vescy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Of Scotland, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder' em 1244, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1253, em Gascogne, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Watton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Vesci родился 16 мая 1205 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Eustace de Vescy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Of Scotland, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder' в 1244 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 7 октября 1253 г. в местности гаскогн, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности ваттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
